title: Learn Vehicle Licensing lesson by lesson.
description: Study SPSV vehicle applications, renewals, discs, inspections, categories, wheelchair requirements and branding in focused lessons.

lessons.title: Applications, Renewals and Licence Updates
lessons.intro: Applying, renewing, replacing, surrendering and updating SPSV vehicle licences.
lessons.memoryTrick: Apply with proof, renew early, update the NTA.
commonMistakes: Confusing initial applications with renewal requirements
Forgetting notice periods and replacement windows

lessons.title: Tamper-Proof Discs, Roof Signs and Information Cards
lessons.intro: Disc colours, disc positions, passenger capacity, roof signs and in-vehicle information.
lessons.memoryTrick: Disc identifies the vehicle; roof sign shows availability.
commonMistakes: Confusing vehicle licence numbers with registration numbers
Mixing up disc colours between SPSV categories

lessons.title: SPSV Categories and Operating Rights
lessons.intro: Taxi, hackney, limousine and wheelchair vehicle categories and where each may operate.
lessons.memoryTrick: Street pickup belongs to taxi categories.
commonMistakes: Assuming every SPSV category may use bus lanes or pick up on the street

lessons.title: Inspections, Roadworthiness and Technical Reports
lessons.intro: NCT, suitability inspections, renewal assessments and Technical Assessor reports.
lessons.memoryTrick: NCT proves roadworthiness; suitability proves SPSV fitness.
commonMistakes: Using the wrong inspection for a vehicle change or renewal

lessons.title: Wheelchair Accessible Vehicle Licensing
lessons.intro: Ramps, restraints, passenger capacity, symbols and wheelchair vehicle licence rules.
lessons.memoryTrick: Ramp, anchor, belt and accessibility symbol.
commonMistakes: Forgetting the separate wheelchair and occupant restraints
Mixing wheelchair taxi and wheelchair hackney requirements

lessons.title: Advertising, Branding and Windows
lessons.intro: Advertising limits, official branding areas and window visibility requirements.
lessons.memoryTrick: Advertising must never hide official taxi information.
commonMistakes: Forgetting the minimum visible light transmission

lessons.title: Vehicle Age and Registration Standards
lessons.intro: How a vehicle's age and birth date are determined for SPSV licensing.
lessons.memoryTrick: Vehicle age starts at first registration in any country.
commonMistakes: Using manufacture date instead of first registration

lessons.title: Final Mixed Vehicle Licensing Test
lessons.intro: All 71 Vehicle Licensing questions mixed together.
lessons.memoryTrick: Identify category, document and inspection before answering.
commonMistakes: Rushing similar licence and inspection questions
Confusing driver licensing with vehicle licensing
